1.14: Notify Principal Office, Completions Team of any familial relationship between the seller and the conveyancer.
1.15: Notify Principal Office, Completions Team of any familial relationship between the borrower and the conveyancer.
3.1.3: Notification of seller's solicitor name and address is required.
3.1.4: Contact: Principal Office, Completions Team for unrepresented sellers.
3.1.5: No alternative documents are accepted for identity verification.
3.2.3: Notification of seller's solicitor is only required if the society's solicitor is also acting for the seller. Contact: Principal Office, Completions Team.
3.2.4: Contact: Principal Office, Completions Team for unrepresented sellers.
4.1: Society accepts no liability for property assessments by independent valuers.
Borrowers receive a copy of the Property Assessment Report for purchase transactions.
Conveyancers must advise borrowers to obtain an independent report.
4.3: Contact: Principal Office, Completions Team for incorrect valuation assumptions.
4.5a: Contact: Principal Office, Completions Team for re-inspections.
4.5b: Send Certificate of Title to Principal Office, Completions Team via email or post.
5.1.1: Contact: Principal Office, Completions Team if seller ownership is under 6 months.
5.2.1: Contact: Principal Office, Completions Team if the seller is not the registered owner.
5.4.4: Environmental or contaminated land reports are only required if adverse entries appear in local authority searches.
5.4.5: Personal searches are prohibited for house purchases except between 1 June 2021 and 30 June 2021.
Personal searches are acceptable for remortgages if the firm is PCCB registered and maintains appropriate indemnity.
5.4.6: Search insurance is prohibited for purchases except between 1 June 2021 and 30 June 2021.
Search insurance is acceptable for remortgages.
Policies must cover market value and mortgage term for both borrower and Society.
5.5.3a: Contact: Principal Office, Completions Team if planning breaches or unsatisfied conditions exist.
5.5.3b: Original or copy planning permissions are not required.
5.5.3c: Building regulation consents are not required.
5.5.3d: Certificates of lawful use or development are not required.
5.5.4: Contact: Principal Office, Completions Team for restrictions affecting value or marketability.
5.7.1a: Flying freeholds are acceptable up to 25% of total floor area.
5.7.1c: Report flying freeholds to Principal Office, Completions Team.
5.8.1: Contact Principal Office, Completions Team regarding security in buildings of 4 or fewer flats where borrower owns the freehold and occupies one unit.
5.8.5: Security involving cross-freehold reversions of two leasehold flats is not accepted.
5.10.1: Contact: Principal Office, Completions Team for use restrictions.
5.13.1: Contact: Principal Office, Completions Team if purchase funds are not from the borrower or if a second charge is proposed.
5.14.1: Minimum lease term: 85 years at mortgage commencement.
Minimum lease term: 50 years remaining at the end of the mortgage term.
5.14.9: Contact: Principal Office, Completions Team for lease matters.
5.14.10: Contact: Principal Office, Completions Team for service charge matters.
5.14.11: Indemnity insurance is acceptable for unsatisfactory lease terms.
Lease variations require Society consent for other defects.
5.14.12: Ground rent and service charge receipts are not required.
5.14.13: Receipted copy of notice or evidence of service must be provided.
5.14.15a: Contact: Principal Office, Completions Team for absentee or insolvent landlords.
5.14.15b: Indemnity insurance is acceptable for absent or insolvent landlords.
5.15.2a: Contact: Principal Office, Completions Team for management company issues.
5.15.2b: Management company share certificates are not required.
5.15.2c: Signed blank stock transfer forms are not required.
5.15.2d: Memorandum and Articles of Association are not required.
5.16.2: Contact: Principal Office, Completions Team if unable to certify a search entry.
5.17.5a: Submit Power of Attorney with Title Documents after completion.
5.17.5b: Submit statutory declaration of non-revocation of Power of Attorney with Title Documents after completion.
5.19.1: Contact: Principal Office, Completions Team regarding affordable housing, shared equity, or shared ownership.
5.20.1: Report solar PV panel leases not meeting UK Finance minimum requirements to Principal Office, Completions Team.

Post-completion Energy Provider requests must use the CML template and be sent to Principal Office, Completions Team.

Required info: outstanding balance, monthly payment, remaining term, work list, guarantees, and EPC.
6.1.3: Contact: Principal Office, Mortgage Department, Advances Section if offer is not taken.

6.3.1: Contact: Principal Office, Mortgage Department, Advances Section for purchase price issues.
6.4.5: Contact: Principal Office, Mortgage Department, Advances Section if the conveyancer lacks control over purchase money payment.
6.5.1: Contact: Principal Office, Mortgage Department, Advances Section if vacant possession is not provided.

6.6.2: Contact: Principal Office, Mortgage Department, Advances Section if letting details are missing.
6.6.3: Provide counterpart or certified copy of tenancy agreement after completion unless offer states otherwise.
6.6.4: Houses in Multiple Occupation (HMOs) are not accepted.
6.7.1: Accepted warranties: NHBC, Zurich Municipal (pre-30/09/09), Premier Guarantee, Protek, One Guarantee, Building Life Plans (excludes self-build under construction), LABC, Castle 10, Build Assure, Q Policy, Checkmate Castle 10 (must include outbuildings), Global Home Warranties, Ark Residential (requires outbuilding endorsement), Aedis Homeproof.
Other schemes require referral to Mortgage Department, Advances Section.
6.7.2: Insert warranty details on Certificate of Title.
Submit warranty certificate with Title Documents.
6.7.3: Assignments of building standards indemnity schemes must be sent.
6.7.4: Refer properties lacking a new home warranty to Mortgage Department, Advances Section.
6.7.6: Professional consultant's certificate must be sent.
6.8.1: Contact: Principal Office, Mortgage Department, Advances Section for absent agreements/bonds for unadopted roads or sewers.
6.9.1: Contact: Principal Office, Mortgage Department, Advances Section for missing easements.
6.10.2: Retentions and instalments are released to the borrower unless otherwise agreed.
6.11.1: Contact: Principal Office, Mortgage Department, Advances Section for redevelopment or road proposals.
6.12.1: Contact: Principal Office, Mortgage Department, Advances Section for pre-emption rights, resale restrictions, or options.
6.13.1: Contact: Principal Office, Mortgage Department, Advances Section for undischarged repair/improvement grants.
7.3: Consent required from all occupants aged 17+.
Copy must be sent to Mortgage Department, Advances Section upon signing.
Original must be sent with Title Documents.

10.3: Completion fees may apply as specified in Mortgage Offer Section 8.
10.7: Delayed completion funds must be returned via quickest practicable means.

10.11: Interest is charged from the date of advance until funds are returned.

Registration delays over 30 days require status updates every 30 days via LMS.
